flag_contract: samtools mpileup -B -q 0 -Q 0 (permissive; matches the depth path)
note: DIAGNOSTIC read-only evidence table; regional D6-fraction profile; NOT an identity caller

falsifier_verdict.interpretation: The paired-coordinate PSV D6-fraction PROFILE reproduces the Cyrius hybrid signatures: *68 (5' high / 3' low), *13 (opposite), *36 (exon-9-tip dip); non-hybrids (normal/dup/deletion) stay flat. Directional 5'-3' cleanly catches *68 + *13; the *36 exon-9 conversion needs the dedicated exon9-tip feature (the subtlest case). PROOF-OF-SIGNAL on n=1/type -> GO to draft the Phase-B abstaining identity classifier; NOT a powered per-allele validation.
